title: PDF Viewer: fit-to-width, streaming load, no remount storms (dbg85)
description:
Fixes three PDF Viewer issues from dbg83/84: pages appeared over-zoomed (fit used scaled layout width instead of viewerBaseW), slow or failed loads (entire archive was downloaded into memory before pdf.js), and random refreshes (every ensure/remount destroyed and rebuilt the viewer).

Now: stream PDF via URL with range requests, idempotent mount (skip if same plan signature), auto fit-to-width on first open, tile cache for scroll-back, and fit runs after mount. Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg85).
changeLog: Fit-to-width uses viewerBaseW so pages are not over-zoomed.
PDF.js streams archive URL — no full arrayBuffer download first.
Idempotent continuous viewer mount stops remount/refresh loops.
Tile cache (48 pages) for faster scroll-back.
Mount generation guard cancels stale async loads.
